tooltip.grappling-armor.guidebook: Right-click to read recipes, controls, and loot chances.
guide.grappling-armor.title: === Grappling Armor Guide ===
guide.grappling-armor.line1: Starter gift: new players receive this guidebook once.
guide.grappling-armor.line2: Replacement recipe: Book + Grappling Hook = Grappling Guidebook.
guide.grappling-armor.line3: Hook recipe: stick top-right, iron ingot center, iron chain bottom-left.
guide.grappling-armor.line4: Handle recipe: polished blackstone top/bottom, diamond center.
guide.grappling-armor.line5: Grappling Device recipe: vertical polished blackstone, control device top-right, handle middle-left.
guide.grappling-armor.line6: Control Core recipe: control device center, lapis blocks around it.
guide.grappling-armor.line7: Control Armor recipe: netherite chestplate center, polished blackstone sides, iron top, gold/iron/gold bottom.
guide.grappling-armor.line8: Suit recipe: control core above grappling control armor.
guide.grappling-armor.line9: Twin Blades recipe: two netherite swords top, two handles middle, redstone bottom-center.
guide.grappling-armor.line10: Loot: weaponsmith house hook 40%, handle 50%, control device 3%.
guide.grappling-armor.line11: Loot: shipwreck treasure control device 6%, buried treasure control device 10%.
guide.grappling-armor.line13: Trade: master weaponsmith sells grappling parts for 6 emeralds.
guide.grappling-armor.line14: Upgrade: use grappling parts in an anvil with the device/suit to increase range. Max level 5.
guide.grappling-armor.line15: Controls: right-click fires the hook, Ctrl swings, Shift dashes.
guide.grappling-armor.line16: Suit combo: dash then attack with twin blades for bonus damage and knockback.
guide.grappling-armor.line17: Stats: suit defense is 20x netherite, twin blades deal 45 damage, hook deals 20 damage.
guide.grappling-armor.line18: Effect: the hook flies as a projectile with chain rope particles and a hook tip.
